Subject: A young man
Theme: A serene moment under the Northern Lights by a snow-capped mountain peak
Event: Standing at the summit of a snow-capped mountain, the young man gazes upward as the aurora borealis dances vividly across the twilight sky, filling him with awe at the breathtaking natural spectacle.
story_prompts: The same A young man stands on a rocky ledge, eyes lifted toward a vast twilight sky beginning to deepen into night, with jagged snow-capped mountains visible beneath the fading light.
The same A young man steps closer to the mountain peak's edge, awe growing as faint green lights of the aurora borealis start illuminating the darkening twilight sky above rugged snowy peaks.

The same A young man raises both arms slightly, mesmerized as vibrant aurora borealis ribbons stretch vividly across the expansive twilight sky, the prominent snow-capped mountain peak looming behind.

The same A young man stands firmly atop the snow-capped mountain peak, completely absorbed as brilliant aurora borealis waves ripple dramatically across the entire deep twilight sky surrounding quiet, frozen mountain ridges.
